'Load Table To Prop At Date', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/LoadTableToPropAtDate', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Sends EOD irrigation slack alert', 'name': 'Send Eod Irrigation Slack Alert', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/SendEODIrrigationSlackAlert', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Sends OOS irrigation slack alert', 'name': 'Send Oos Slack Alert', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/SendOOSSlackAlert', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Sends a report with how many loads to propagation have been ' 'done today', 'name': 'Send Prop Load Report', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/SendPropLoadReport', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Sends a report with: report gaps; report doubles; report ' 'tables loaded without cultivar set; report tables with no ' 'load date; report rows with badly ordered load dates; report ' "tables in germ that aren't loaded; report tables in limbo; " 'and report tables with unknown errors', 'name': 'Send Prop Map Report', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/SendPropMapReport', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Sends an irrigation request', 'name': 'Send Single Irrigation Request', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/SendSingleIrrigationRequest', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'When a table arrives as the propagation load side there will ' 'be a transaction that tells FarmOS about the table arrival. ' 'This table then would be orchestrated to the proper prop ' 'level automatically. The elements of this orchestration ' 'are:\n' ' 1. Information about the table at hand\n' ' 2. Current state of the farm (how many tables have been ' 'loaded already today)\n' ' 3. The production plan (how many tables - full or empty - ' 'need to be loaded in which order today)\n' ' Putting the three pieces of information above together ' 'FarmOS will:\n' ' 1. Either find a destination prop level --> This triggers a ' 'prop_load of said table to the proper prop level\n' ' 2. A destination is not found --> This triggers a manual ' 'intervention with a verbose reason explaining exactly why no ' 'destination is found. The operator then needs to fix the ' 'production plan accordingly and re-try.', 'name': 'Table Arrived', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/TableArrived', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Unloads a prop line', 'name': 'Unload Prop Line', 'path': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Sends a report with how many loads to propagation have been ' 'done today', 'name': 'Send Prop Load Report', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/SendPropLoadReport', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Sends a report with: report gaps; report doubles; report ' 'tables loaded without cultivar set; report tables with no ' 'load date; report rows with badly ordered load dates; report ' "tables in germ that aren't loaded; report tables in limbo; " 'and report tables with unknown errors', 'name': 'Send Prop Map Report', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/SendPropMapReport', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Sends an irrigation request', 'name': 'Send Single Irrigation Request', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/SendSingleIrrigationRequest', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'When a table arrives as the propagation load side there will ' 'be a transaction that tells FarmOS about the table arrival. ' 'This table then would be orchestrated to the proper prop ' 'level automatically. The elements of this orchestration ' 'are:\n' ' 1. Information about the table at hand\n' ' 2. Current state of the farm (how many tables have been ' 'loaded already today)\n' ' 3. The production plan (how many tables - full or empty - ' 'need to be loaded in which order today)\n' ' Putting the three pieces of information above together ' 'FarmOS will:\n' ' 1. Either find a destination prop level --> This triggers a ' 'prop_load of said table to the proper prop level\n' ' 2. A destination is not found --> This triggers a manual ' 'intervention with a verbose reason explaining exactly why no ' 'destination is found. The operator then needs to fix the ' 'production plan accordingly and re-try.', 'name': 'Table Arrived', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/Propagation/lines/PropagationRack/interfaces/PropRack/methods/TableArrived', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Unloads a prop line', 'name': 'Unload Prop Line', 'path': This is necessary because ' 'unload function does not move a tower out of the grow line ' 'and that is because there is no scanner at the end of the ' 'grow lines.', 'name': 'Cleanup Vertical Grow', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/VerticalGrow/lines/GrowRoom/machines/MESGrowRoom/interfaces/MESGrowRoom/methods/CleanupVerticalGrow', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Removes all towers from a given position on a given growline ' 'and puts them in a special overflow storage.', 'name': 'Clear Tower From Position', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/VerticalGrow/lines/GrowRoom/machines/MESGrowRoom/interfaces/MESGrowRoom/methods/ClearTowerFromPosition', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Gets a dictionary of Growout tower locations', 'name': 'Get Grow Tower Locations', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/VerticalGrow/lines/GrowRoom/machines/MESGrowRoom/interfaces/MESGrowRoom/methods/GetGrowTowerLocations', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Gets the occupancy of growout as a dictionary', 'name': 'Get Growout Occupancy', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/VerticalGrow/lines/GrowRoom/machines/MESGrowRoom/interfaces/MESGrowRoom/methods/GetGrowoutOccupancy', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'A decision has been made to either laydown a tower (pass to ' 'central processing) or keep it in the grow conveyance and ' 'not lay down.', 'name': 'Laydown', 'path': 'sites/SSF2/areas/VerticalGrow/lines/GrowRoom/machines/MESGrowRoom/interfaces/MESGrowRoom/methods/Laydown', 'type': 'tell'}, {'description': 'Moves a given tower to a given position on a growline.
